---
description: dev-harness の品質ゲートを実行し、結果を要約して報告する
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `harness skill sync` — edit harness.yaml / project_profile.json instead, this file is overwritten on sync -->

Run the project's quality gates with `harness gate run $ARGUMENTS` (pass `--changed` to scope to changed files, `--only test,build` for a subset).
Then summarize the result: which gates passed/failed, the failure reasons, and the concrete next step for each required failure. The full report is in `.harness/reports/`.
